description: Creates a custom vocabulary filter that you can use to mask, delete, or flag specific words from your transcript.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the vocabulary filter.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the vocabulary filter.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

VocabularyFilterName.description: A unique name, chosen by you, for your custom vocabulary filter.
VocabularyFilterName.markdownDescription:
A unique name, chosen by you, for your custom vocabulary filter.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 200  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-zA-Z._-]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

LanguageCode.description: The language code that represents the language of the entries in your vocabulary filter.
LanguageCode.markdownDescription:
The language code that represents the language of the entries in your vocabulary filter.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

Words.description: Use this parameter if you want to create your custom vocabulary filter by including all desired terms, as comma-separated values, within your request.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Words.markdownDescription:
Use this parameter if you want to create your custom vocabulary filter by including all desired terms, as comma-separated values, within your request.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

VocabularyFilterFileUri.description: The Amazon S3 location of the text file that contains your custom vocabulary filter terms.
VocabularyFilterFileUri.markdownDescription:
The Amazon S3 location of the text file that contains your custom vocabulary filter terms.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2000  
Pattern: ^(s3://|http(s*)://).+$  
Update requires: No interruption

DataAccessRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that has permissions to access the Amazon S3 bucket that contains your input files.
DataAccessRoleArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that has permissions to access the Amazon S3 bucket that contains your input files.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-us-gov|aws-iso-{0,1}[a-z]{0,1}):iam::[0-9]{0,63}:role/[A-Za-z0-9:_/+=,@.-]{0,1024}$  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.description: Tags associated with the vocabulary filter.
Tags.markdownDescription:
Tags associated with the vocabulary filter.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.markdownDescription:
The key of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The value of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the vocabulary filter.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the vocabulary filter.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
